caption:
🎒 They say teachers sleep after the bell rings, but I prefer the quiet hours. 🌙

Tonight, the library was mine. The air smelled of old paper and espresso. ☕

I sat in my favorite corner, the silk of my blouse cool against my skin, the fitted pencil skirt hugging my hips. A student arrived, eyes wide with late-night anxiety. 📖

'Need help with the thesis?' I asked, my voice dropping an octave.

We slid into the leather armchairs, the space between us shrinking as the project became personal. My blazer slipped slightly off one shoulder, the curve of my collarbone visible in the soft overhead light. 💡

He leaned in, breath warm, and I felt the heat rise in my chest, hidden beneath the fabric. 🌋

'Focus,' I whispered, but my hips betrayed my smile.

By the time dawn broke, the work was done, but the tension lingered, electric and unspoken. 🔥

Sometimes, the best lessons aren't written in books. They're felt in the silence between the pages. 📚💋

#UniversityTeacher #CurvyAndConfident #LateNightStudy #ProfessorVibes #CampusLife #SilkBlouse #SecretAdventures #InstaTeach
